calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Denied

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patty Dowling.
Daniel Stern, Esq. for Plaintiff: Avalonbay Communities, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Brianna Clabourne, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant: Anthony Jackson.
EXH.1 - Lease/Rental Agreement -------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant: ANTHONY JACKSON and Defaulted Defendant: JAGUAR INTERNATIONAL as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 8 Locksley Ave, #8A, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement/Lease declared forfeited.
Damages/Principal $7,481.10
Costs $3,800.00 for a total of $11,281.10.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit 1 in court.
